title: CoreWithStuff
description: Core mod for creations of Server with Stuff and to help Palladium Developers
body:
Core mod for all ServerWithStuff creations

CoreWithStuff is a lightweight library and content mod designed to provide Palladium developers for their addons with things like Abilities, Conditions, Blocks etc. While it functions as a dependency, it also adds essential utilities to your world including;

The Alloy Smelter: A processing machine. It features a toggleable Energy Mode allowing it to run on fuels like Coal, Wood or Energies like FE/RF.

Power Steal,Copy,Remove,Detection like abilities.

Custom Wallrunning ability integrated thru the GravityAPI.

Screenshake ability with configurable intensity.

Different Conditions to help developers make their power easier and more managable.

Capacitors: Portable energy storage units. Players can use the capacitor to transport power or act as a battery inside your Alloy Smelter to charge it.

The Alloy Smelter and Capacitor is compatible with any mod using Energy like Ender IO, Mekanism etc.

A Custom Space System

and Many more to be seen check it out yourself!

MORE DOCUMENTATION CAN BE FOUND ON THE [WIKI PAGE](http://notion.so/CoreWithStuff-Wiki-354ef0af32f480fe85e6c9c44b6346c3) or [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/serverwithstuff)

You are free to use this mod in any mod/addon/modpack.  You are not allowed to redistribute anything from the core, Contact ServerWithStuff team for questions you can join the discord https://discord.gg/serverwithstuff 

a link back to this page is always appreciated!
